notes: Doesn't work for me with Proton and DXVK, the logo will be shown but then nothing happens.
title: MXGP3 - The Official Motocross Videogame

notes: Game works native on Linux (OpenGL), but the Linux port is not the best. On Proton it doesn't work for me, neither with DXVK (just a red logo, then nothing happens) nor with WineD3D (game starts somehow but crashes in the main menu).
title: MXGP3 - The Official Motocross Videogame

notes: 3440x1440, vsync/aa/sa off, ultra preset. ~70 fps pretty stable and smooth without spikes or slowdowns. Logitech F710 works great. btw the linux port is utter crap
title: MXGP3 - The Official Motocross Videogame

(with official 4.11-2 the game runs around 30 fps and crashes on exit.) btw the linux port is utter crap. get Glorious Eggrolls Proton here: https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/tag/4.14-GE-1
title: MXGP3 - The Official Motocross Videogame

notes: 3440x1440, vsync/aa/sa off, ultra preset. with official 4.11-2 the game runs around 30 fps, is a stuttery mess and crashes on exit. but with 4.14-GE-1 i get ~70 fps pretty stable and smooth without spikes or slowdowns. Logitech F710 works great. btw the linux port is utter crap, don't waste your time on it. download GloriousEggroll proton here https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases
title: MXGP3 - The Official Motocross Videogame
